title: Spit It Out
description: A client-side mod that logs exceptions that stop you from joining a server
body:
Spit It Out is a client-side Minecraft mod designed to enhance your troubleshooting experience when connecting to modded servers. No more confusion with vague "Connection Lost" screens! This mod logs the full exception or just the cause, based on your preference. #### As of **20.4.115-beta** of NeoForge the functionality of the mod is now part of NeoForge itself

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"

For questions feel free to join my Discord. ## Want to support us? ##

  -Mrbysco
